seoTitle: Rathmines vs Ravensdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rathmines and Ravensdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rathmines and Ravensdale.
heading: Rathmines vs Ravensdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rathmines, New South Wales and Ravensdale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rathmines has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Ravensdale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rathmines or Ravensdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rathmines has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Ravensdale scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rathmines scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Ravensdale scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rathmines or Ravensdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rathmines has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
